content.problemStatement:
Write a C program that takes input for an array of 8 integers and finds the maximum value in the array. Print the maximum value.


Input Format

A single line containing 8 space-separated integers.
constraints: Each test case contains exactly 8 integers
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of eight space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum integer among the eight given, on a new line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Each line is a test case of eight integers. The maximums are 8, 80 and -1 respectively.
First test case maximum is 1000, second test case maximum is also 1000.
The largest value among the eight numbers is 5.

solution.approach: For each test case we need the largest of eight numbers. Since the number of elements is fixed (8), we can read them one by one while maintaining a variable `max`. Initialise `max` with the first value, then for the remaining seven values update `max` whenever a larger value is seen. After processing the eight numbers we output `max`. This runs in O(8) per test case, i.e., O(T) overall, and uses O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) total (8 operations per test case).
